sections.paragraph: Chald. i.q. Hebr. עֵבֶר No. 1, region beyond; hence עֲבַר נַהֲרָא the region beyond the Euphrates, according to the Persian manner of speaking, i.e. the region west of the Euphrates, Ezr 4:10, 11 Ezr 4:11, 16 Ezr 4:16, 20 Ezr 4:20 5:3 6:6 , Ezr 6:8, 13 Ezr 6:13 7:21 , 25 Ezr 7:25.
